news:news.news:title: Experts challenge US claims about an Iran missile strike, while Artemis II embarks on a historic lunar mission and Cuba plans to release over 2,000 prisoners amid US pressure.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran missile strike controversy, Artemis II lunar mission update, Cuba prisoner release news, Burkina Faso military leadership, Italy football team management changes

news:news.news:title: The US jobs market showed resilience with job growth in March, but concerns linger over oil supply disruptions and corporate practices.
news:news.news:keywords: US jobs market analysis, impact of Gulf oil crisis, Ticketmaster fee controversy, Trump's tariff threats, SpaceX public offering news

news:news.news:title: Utah allows AI to prescribe psychiatric drugs, marking a significant shift in healthcare technology, while Apple celebrates its 50th anniversary with a focus on its best products.
news:news.news:keywords: AI in healthcare, Apple's product history, privacy issues in tech, Reddit platform changes, consumer tech deals

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods faces DUI charges following a recent arrest, while NFL draft discussions intensify with key prospects and coaching changes in various sports.
news:news.news:keywords: NFL draft prospects analysis, Tiger Woods DUI arrest details, Luka Doncic injury update, Gennaro Gattuso resignation, Phil Mickelson Masters withdrawal

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific advancements include a gene therapy for deafness, insights into aging and immune response, and a new era of lunar exploration with NASA's Artemis II.
news:news.news:keywords: gene therapy for hearing loss, impact of aging on immune response, NASA Artemis II mission details, ancient fossils and spider origins, lead exposure in children's clothing

news:news.news:title: The ongoing war in Iran is causing significant economic distress and impacting global supply chains, while political tensions in the US and Europe continue to rise.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran war humanitarian crisis, Trump political changes, Brazil pet custody law, Greece weather impact, US-Israel relations

news:news.news:title: Oil prices surged following Trump's warning to Iran, while Blue Owl Capital limited withdrawals amid investor concerns over the unregulated lending market.
news:news.news:keywords: impact of geopolitical tensions on oil prices, corporate layoffs in tech sector, pharmaceutical industry tariffs, investor confidence in lending markets, construction worker health issues

news:news.news:title: Archive of Our Own exits beta after 17 years, while Granola app raises privacy concerns over note-sharing settings.
news:news.news:keywords: privacy concerns in technology, updates on popular tech platforms, new product innovations in gadgets

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods faces DUI charges following a crash, while Luka Doncic's injury raises concerns for the NBA playoffs.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods DUI arrest details, Luka Doncic injury update, Phil Mickelson Masters withdrawal, Stephon Gilmore retirement announcement, Women's NCAA Final Four predictions

news:news.news:title: NASA's Artemis II mission marks the first crewed Moon flyby in over 50 years, alongside significant discoveries in health, archaeology, and environmental science.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission details, health benefits of new frying technique, ancient gambling practices in America, microbial fingerprints in colorectal cancer, new species discoveries in South America

news:news.news:title: Oil Prices Spike Amid Trump’s Warning on Iran; Blue Owl Capital Limits Withdrawals
